questions.question_text: Derive Schrodinger wave equation for particle in one dimensional box.
Discuss Heisenberg’s Uncertainty principle.
What is corrosion? How it can be prevented?
What is Stereoisomerism? Discuss it with reference to coordination complexes.
Define and explain Jahn-Teller theorem.
Write a short note on column chromatography.
What is Valence Bond theory? How does this theory explains the structure of inorganic molecules?
Define and explain the phenomenon of resonance in inorganic compounds.
Write some general characteristics of actinides.
What is photoelectric effect? How quantum mechanics explains this effect?
What is wave-function? Discuss its interpretation given by Born.
What are fuel cells? Discuss their working with suitable examples.
What are electron-deficient compounds? Discuss bond in such compounds.
Define and explain the VSEPR model to explain the geometry of inorganic substances.
Discuss variation in oxidation states of lanthanides.
What is Nernst equation? Explain it.
Define and explain Kohlrausch’s law.
Write a short note on Arrhenius equation.
What is crystal field theory? How does this theory explain the geometry of complexes?
Explain Lewis theory of acids and bases.
Write a short note on thin layer chromatography.
